correlations.label: Unemployment Rate
correlations.description: Areas with higher unemployment rate consistently show higher crime rates

correlations.description: Areas with higher age 20-24 share consistently show higher crime rates

correlations.label: Private Renting Rate
correlations.description: Areas with higher private renting rate consistently show higher crime rates

correlations.label: Recent Migration Rate
correlations.description: Areas with higher recent migration rate consistently show higher crime rates

correlations.label: Deprivation Score
correlations.description: Areas with higher deprivation score consistently show higher crime rates

correlations.label: Population Density
correlations.description: Areas with higher population density weakly show higher crime rates

correlations.label: No Qualifications Rate
correlations.description: Areas with higher no qualifications rate weakly show higher crime rates

meta.method: Spearman rank correlation + simple OLS regression
